prompt: Weekly route planner for NYC mobile vendors — dark ops terminal aesthetic with drag-drop 7-day schedule grid, AI suggest week

htmlStructure.title: NYC Ops Terminal // Vanguard Route Planner

recommendations: Start from the closest existing route instead of inventing a new app surface.
Port the artifact into Next.js route and component files instead of shipping a standalone HTML blob.
Map spacing, radius, and color choices onto existing Tailwind tokens and utility patterns.
Preserve existing CSS variables instead of introducing a parallel token set.
Use the generated preview as the visual truth source while porting the layout.
